overview: Giant Centipede is a SubBoss-class Beast/Giant/Insect monster found in Goblin Cave. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 900 HP, 22 physical damage, 170 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 4. 1 attack, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Melee Attack at 130% ratio (286 base damage).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Poison
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Poison icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Ice, Earth
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Ice (-3000), Earth (-4000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.stuck_description: Has stuck-detection failsafes in behavior tree.
